title: Scammers want your launch day money: this tool stops you falling foul of fake Samsung Galaxy Unpacked pre-orders
summary: If you don't recognise the store and it's offering a Samsung Galaxy deal or Flip and Fold 8 stock that you can't find anywhere else, then it's very likely a scam.
